description_long: This is a classic hamburger featuring a golden-brown sesame seed bun partially wrapped in branded paper. The top bun is dotted with sesame seeds and slightly domed, while the lower bun is flatter and supports a generous filling. Inside, a thick beef patty is topped with a melted slice of cheddar cheese, crisp lettuce, and caramelized onions, with some bacon visible peeking out. The lettuce is shredded and layered beneath the patty, providing a fresh green contrast to the rich browns and yellows of the meat and cheese. The wrapper covers about half of the burger, displaying text and logos, and helps contain the ingredients. The overall appearance is appetizing, with visible layers and textures that suggest a freshly prepared, hearty meal.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with melted cheese, lettuce, bacon, and onions, partially wrapped in branded paper. The layers and textures are clearly visible, making it look fresh and appetizing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sesame seed bun, melted cheese, beef patty, lettuce, bacon, and onions, with the wrapper partially open.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cheese melting over the patty, with lettuce and bacon visible, and more of the wrapper covering the back.
description_view_2: Top-down view dominated by the branded wrapper, with only the top of the bun and a hint of filling visible.
description_view_3: Rear view mostly showing the wrapper with 'The Habit' branding, and a small portion of lettuce and bun peeking out.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered beneath the beef patty, with melted cheese and bacon on top, and caramelized onions above the cheese. The toppings are distributed unevenly, with some spilling out from the sides.
